postman-cs/postman-insights-onboarding-a.purpose: Link an already discovered runtime service to its Postman workspace, environment, and repository.

postman-cs/postman-api-onboarding-action.purpose: Create or reuse Postman assets, synchronize repository metadata, and optionally onboard Insights.

postman-cs/postman-bootstrap-action.purpose: Run the regular onboarding core directly in Harness without the unsupported nested composite loader.

postman-cs/postman-onboarding-tdd.purpose: Validate setup or run PR-scoped spec-versus-implementation contract tests.

postman-cs/postman-repo-sync-action.purpose: Materialize Postman assets in the checked-out repository without an automatic push.
